gaps.evidence_in_top_quartile: Databricks and Dataiku have dedicated AI/ML engineering teams and roles.
gaps.evidence_at_prospect: WiseiTech does not have any open AI/ML specific roles.
gaps.gap_insight: Top competitors are investing in dedicated AI/ML engineering teams, while WiseiTech's current focus is unclear.

gaps.evidence_in_top_quartile: Databricks, Dataiku, and Alteryx leverage modern ML infrastructure like Kubernetes, MLflow, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.
gaps.evidence_at_prospect: WiseiTech's stack does not explicitly list modern ML infrastructure components.
gaps.gap_insight: Leading competitors utilize modern ML infrastructure, which may indicate a difference in engineering maturity.
